signals.raw:
Kevin Warsh's nomination as Fed chair by President Trump is the key breaking development amid surging inflation, with speculation on his first move being a rate hike despite pre-oil shock annual core inflation at 3.9% (pushing 3-month annualized core PCE to 4.56%, over double the 2% target).** [1][3]

NO | HIGH confidence[1][2][3][4][5]
